sections.description: The procession appears as a distant line of reflected light.
The light starts climbing and the pulse becomes ceremonial.
The architecture opens overhead and the motif takes longer steps.
The same procession is seen in silhouette, almost under cloud.
The ascent resolves into certainty rather than climax alone.
A single final bar seals the loop with luminous authority.

insights.message: Beacon counterline returns in ascent and homecoming.
47 symbolic timing placements were normalized into absolute beat events.

rhythm.summary: 100% of note events carry rhythm roles, 95% anchor downbeat presence, 0 offbeat-only bars, cadence contract satisfied
insights: Rhythmic bar roles cover 20 of 20 bars.
Anchor voice articulates the downbeat in 95% of its active bars.
Every active bar retains at least one strong-beat articulation.
Arrival and cadence bars carry stronger beat weight (0.75) than continuation bars (0.64).
Cadence contract satisfied at bar 20, beat 1.
